title: Listen: Off the Ball with Stuart & Tam
summary: Off the Ball is a BBC Radio football show hosted by Stuart and Tam that features commentary and discussion on football topics and current events in the sport.
content: The most petty and ill-informed football show on radio.

zh.title: 聆听：斯图尔特和塔姆主持的《英超场外》
zh.summary: 《英超场外》是由斯图尔特和塔姆主持的英国广播公司电台足球节目，以足球话题和体育时事评论和讨论为特色。

title: Surreal honour to get Notts to Wembley - Belshaw
summary: Goalkeeper James Belshaw, a lifelong Notts County supporter, reflects on the club's achievement in reaching Wembley and the emotional significance of the moment for both himself and the organization.
content: Goalkeeper and lifelong Notts County fan James Belshaw speaks on what it will be like to play for the Magpies at Wembley.

zh.title: 贝尔肖：将诺茨带往温布利是超现实的荣幸
zh.summary: 门神詹姆斯·贝尔肖是诺茨郡足球俱乐部的终身支持者，他反思了俱乐部成功进军温布利球场的成就，以及这一时刻对他本人和俱乐部的情感意义。

title: Earps close to WSL return as PSG exit nears
summary: Former England goalkeeper Mary Earps is preparing to leave Paris Saint-Germain and return to the Women's Super League, marking a significant next chapter in her career.
content: Former England goalkeeper Mary Earps is close to a return to the Women’s Super League, with her exit from Paris St-Germain edging closer.

zh.title: 埃普斯接近回归女超，离开巴黎圣日耳曼在即
zh.summary: 英格兰前门神玛丽·埃普斯正在为离开巴黎圣日耳曼并回归女性超级联赛做准备，这标志着她职业生涯的重要新阶段。

title: What does Premiership climax mean for European places?
summary: Saturday's decisive conclusion to the Scottish Premiership top-six race will determine which Scottish clubs qualify for European competition in the following season.
content: What does Saturday's dramatic and chaotic climax to the Scottish Premiership top-six mean for European football next season?

zh.title: 英超顶峰对欧战席位意味着什么？
zh.summary: 周六苏超前六名争夺的决定性结束将确定哪些苏格兰俱乐部有资格参加下赛季的欧洲竞赛。

title: 'We share same ambition' - Alonso named Chelsea's third boss in year
summary: Xabi Alonso, former Liverpool midfielder, has been appointed Chelsea manager just one day after the club's FA Cup final loss to Manchester City, representing the club's third managerial change within a year.
content: Former Liverpool midfielder Xabi Alonso is appointed as Chelsea manager - a day after their FA Cup final defeat by Manchester City.

zh.title: "我们拥有相同的雄心" - 阿隆索被任命为切尔西一年内第三任主帅
zh.summary: 前利物浦中场球员哈维·阿隆索在俱乐部足总杯决赛负于曼城后仅一天被任命为切尔西主管，这是该俱乐部一年内第三次更换主管。

title: Tipped for relegation to title winners - AGF's 'King Arthur' moment
summary: Aarhus GF has achieved a remarkable turnaround by winning the Danish Superliga championship for the first time in 40 years, having been predicted for relegation at the season's start.
content: Aarhus GF were tipped for relegation from the Danish Superliga this season. Instead, they will lift the championship trophy for the first time in 40 years this Sunday.

zh.title: 从预测降级到夺冠 - 阿尔赫斯的"亚瑟王"时刻
zh.summary: 奥胡斯GF通过赢得丹麦超级联赛冠军实现了显著的逆转，这是该队40年来首次夺冠，而在赛季开始时曾被预测将降级。

title: Rangers to pursue Moore return - gossip
summary: Rangers are targeting the permanent signing of on-loan winger Moore for the upcoming season, while Falkirk explores the sale of their striker to suitable bidders.
content: Rangers want to bring on-loan winger back for next season as Falkirk prepare to sell striker if price is right.

zh.title: 游骑兵寻求摩尔永久回归 - 传言
zh.summary: 游骑兵计划在下赛季永久签约目前租借的边锋摩尔，同时法尔柯克正在探索向合适的竞标者出售其前锋。

title: Balotelli, a Brazil winger and the bid for Serie D promotion
summary: Chievo Verona is attempting to climb from the bottom division with help from notable players Mario Balotelli and former Brazil winger Douglas Costa. This matters because it shows how experienced talent can support a club's promotion ambitions despite competing at a lower level.
content: Chievo Verona are having to rise from the bottom once more, but have had some unlikely help from Mario Balotelli and ex-Brazil winger Douglas Costa.

zh.title: 巴洛特利、巴西边锋与乙级联赛晋级之争
zh.summary: 基耶沃维罗纳队正在试图在著名球员马里奥·巴洛特利和前巴西边锋道格拉斯·科斯塔的帮助下从最低级别联赛中爬升。这很重要，因为它展示了经验丰富的球员如何能够支持俱乐部的晋级野心，尽管他们在较低级别比赛。

title: Ronaldo's trophy wait continues as Al-Nassr upset in final
summary: Cristiano Ronaldo's bid for a first major trophy with Al-Nassr ended in defeat as they lost 1-0 to Gamba Osaka in the AFC Champions League Two final at home. The loss extends his trophy drought at the Saudi Arabian club.
content: Cristiano Ronaldo's wait for a first major trophy with Al-Nassr continues after they are upset 1-0 at home by Gamba Osaka in the AFC Champions League Two final.

zh.title: 罗纳尔多继续等待奖杯，利雅得新城在决赛中出局
zh.summary: 克里斯蒂亚诺·罗纳尔多与利雅得新城赢得首个重大奖杯的努力以失败告终，因为他们在主场的亚冠二级赛决赛中以0比1输给了大阪樱花队。这个失利延续了他在沙特俱乐部的奖杯荒。

title: Casemiro's fond farewell - how Brazilian turned Man Utd career around
summary: Casemiro plays his final match for Manchester United at Old Trafford against Nottingham Forest, departing as a hero after revitalizing his career at the club. His departure marks the end of a significant chapter in the midfielder's trajectory.
content: Casemiro plays his last game for Manchester United at Old Trafford against Nottingham Forest, and will return a hero no matter what the future holds after turning his career around at the club.

zh.title: 卡塞米罗的温馨告别——这位巴西人如何扭转曼联生涯
zh.summary: 卡塞米罗在老特拉福德对诺丁汉森林的比赛中为曼联踢出最后一场球，在重振他在俱乐部职业生涯后以英雄身份离开。他的离开标志着这位中场球员职业生涯重要篇章的结束。
